name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the project?

env.description: ADSP environment / access service to target: test = access-uat.alberta.ca (UAT — use for dev and pre-prod), prod = access.alberta.ca, dev = ADSP platform dev (restricted). Defaults to test.

tenant.description: ADSP tenant name. Enables a single browser login for the full stack — service and frontend agent interactions both use the same tenant-realm token.

tenantRealm.description: Keycloak realm UUID. Optional when --tenant is provided — overrides the realm looked up from the tenant service.

accessToken.description: Access token for ADSP tenant configuration (skips interactive login).

skipAgent.description: Skip the consultAgent interaction and generate base scaffolding only.
